name: Human
description: Common and uninteresting. They learn skills slightly faster.

name: Engi
description: Part machine. They repair systems twice as fast but are poor fighters.

name: Mantis
description: Vicious insectoid warriors. They move fast and deal high damage, but are terrible at repairing.

name: Rockman
description: Large, slow, and made of rock. They have high health and are completely immune to fire.

name: Zoltan
description: Beings of pure energy. They have low health but provide free power to the room they occupy.

name: Slug
description: Telepathic slugs. They reveal adjacent rooms and enemy crew, and cannot be mind-controlled.

name: Lanius
description: Metallic scavengers. They drain oxygen from the room they are in, but do not need to breathe.

name: Crystal
description: Ancient ancestors of the Rockmen. They take reduced suffocation damage and can lock down rooms.
